productName: Refine CCELL® FULL SPEC Disposable Bar - 1g - Animal Cookies [ I ]
description: An all-in-one hybrid disposable vape preloaded with Animal Cookies oil — no battery to charge, no cart to screw on, just unbox, draw, and enjoy. Zero setup, all flavor — with notes of nutty, earthy, and sweet, with a versatile, anytime balance.
